---
title: "Leekgreen Lexicostatistical Squamata"
authors:
  - name: "farahE00"
    url: "https://github.com/farahE00"
  - name: "Maxim-Seelig"
    url: "https://github.com/Maxim-Seelig"
  - name: "wichristian"
    url: "https://github.com/wichristian"
authors_links: "[farahE00](https://github.com/farahE00), [Maxim-Seelig](https://github.com/Maxim-Seelig), [wichristian](https://github.com/wichristian)"
rank: 4
---
**Screencast**

<video controls width="100%" style="margin-bottom: 2em;"><source src="group_leekgreen_lexicostatistical_squamata_screencast.mp4" type="video/mp4"></video>
**Ausarbeitung**

<iframe src="Projekt_Facebook.html" loading="lazy" width="100%" height="1200" style="border:0"></iframe>
